creator: rodrigc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some more info.  If I run this testcase under valgrind, I get some
warnings.

valgrind --track-origins=yes -v yacc -v -d -p err_syntax27_ -b test-err_syntax27 ./err_syntax27.y
